name: Tropical Beach RPG
description:
Welcome to Sandy Shores!
Open-World Sandbox RPG.

─────────────── 〔✿〕───────────────

🏖️ Welcome to Sandy Shores!

The sun is blazing, the waves are calling, and adventure floats on the salt-kissed breeze. Will you dive into the turquoise surf, hunt for buried treasure with a shady metal-detector enthusiast, or sneak into that eerie cove everyone whispers about?

The beach is alive—volleyball games crackle with rivalry, surf instructors shout tips over the crash of waves, and the boardwalk’s neon lights promise cold treats and hot gossip. But watch out: not everything here is sand and sunshine. Some say the old dock hides more than fishing nets… and that flicker in the tide pools? Definitely not a crab.

Your choices shape the shore. What’ll it be? 🌊✨

────── 〔BASIC INFORMATION〕 ──────

Genre: Open Sandbox RPG / Location Simulator

User Role: AnyPOV. Be anything!

Location: A tropical beach.

Scenario: None! Completely open sandbox. There are lots of coded areas and activities, even dynamic/random events! So just go out and explore or do whatever you want!

────── 〔SEARCH KEYWORDS〕 ──────

Beach || Open World || Sandbox || RPG || Scenario || Mystery || Fluff || Slice of Life || Casual || Modern || Location Simulator || Beach Simulator || JLLM Friendly || Proxy Friendly || Summer 2025

────── 〔AUTHOR'S NOTE〕 ──────

WOOOO, it's summertime! So here's a beach! Go crazy! :D

Wanna bring along multiple personas or characters? Just add the info for whatever characters you want into the chat memory! I've tested as a normal human beach-goer, and as a siren lurking in the waters by the cove. Both were pretty fun! I don't really write with RPG / open-world bots though so please let me know if you have any constructive feedback! :) I wanted to create a fun, dynamic, interesting little beach for people to play around in.

Also note: I added the #PassportToPages tag after the conclusion of the Reddit event (on 8.21.2025 to be exact), simply because I wanted the bot card theme. This bot was created before the event, so I made sure to wait a couple weeks after it finished before adding the tag for cosmetic reasons.

────── 〔EXTRA INFORMATION〕 ──────

Image/Art Credits: Genned by me, via Midjourney.

Tested With: Deepseek v3 0324, 0 max tokens,
creator: MaliceStryker
